candidates.why: Explicit D&A line exists above operating profit, but it is a company-level operating D&A line and not clearly tied specifically to the selected COGS bucket ('Raw Materials'). Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification/double counting.
The detailed depreciation rows appear to be components of the overall D&A disclosure, not clearly COGS-specific, and some are likely fixed-asset category details rather than cost-of-sales-only D&A.
Could relate to production assets, but the statement does not explicitly link it to COGS or show it as a separate same-level adjunct to 'Raw Materials'. Too uncertain to add separately.
Asset-class detail under depreciation, not clearly mapped to COGS specifically.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw Materials'. No row explicitly states depreciation/amortisation in COGS/COR/cost of sales. The visible D&A lines look like overall operating D&A disclosures rather than COGS-specific amounts, so conservative treatment is to add nothing separately to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortisation row appears in the operating section. Because the selected XRD row is a supplemental row below operating profit rather than an above-EBIT operating R&D expense row, this operating-section amortisation in R&D may need to be added separately to the XSGA bucket per the special R&D interaction rule.

Separate operating D&A line exists at the same level as major operating expense buckets, suggesting D&A may sit outside the selected SG&A/personnel/other operating expense rows. However, it is not clearly SG&A-specific, so using it for XSGA_DA would be too broad and risks overlap with COGS/other functions.
Detailed depreciation rows appear to be components of total D&A and are not explicitly SG&A-related.
Amortisation of intangible assets could be administrative or other overhead, but the statement does not tie it clearly to SG&A. Lower-priority than the explicit R&D amortisation row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of development costs and other intangible assets
candidates.why: Could include R&D-related amortisation, but it is broader and less directly aligned to the special-case R&D rule than the explicit '...in Research & Development Expenses' row.

variables.notes: MANUALLY CHANGED.
